title: Critical Vulnerability Discovered in Popular VPN Software
excerpt: A critical RCE vulnerability (CVE-2026-12345) affects multiple enterprise VPN solutions. Patch immediately.

title: New Ransomware Group Targets Healthcare Sector
excerpt: A newly identified ransomware group 'MedLock' has been targeting hospitals and healthcare providers across North America and Europe.

title: NIST Releases Updated Zero Trust Guidelines
excerpt: NIST SP 800-207 revision adds new guidance for cloud-native environments and IoT device integration.

title: Major DDoS Attack Disrupts European Banking Services
excerpt: A coordinated DDoS attack lasting 72 hours targeted multiple European financial institutions. Investigation ongoing.

title: AI-Generated Phishing Emails See 300% Increase in 2026
excerpt: Security researchers report a dramatic rise in AI-crafted phishing campaigns with near-perfect grammar and personalization.

title: Microsoft Patch Tuesday: 87 Vulnerabilities Fixed
excerpt: July 2026 Patch Tuesday addresses 87 CVEs including 5 critical and 2 actively exploited zero-days.

title: Cloud Misconfiguration Exposes 2.5 Million Records
excerpt: An unsecured AWS S3 bucket belonging to a major retailer exposed customer PII including partial payment data.

title: FBI Warns of Increased Insider Threat Activity
excerpt: The FBI issues a joint advisory warning organizations about rising insider threat incidents linked to economic pressures.
